text: You think you're tired? You think you've given everything you've got? You haven't even scratched the surface.
Most people operate at about forty percent of their capacity... and then they quit. They tap out. They tell themselves they're done.
But you're not done. Your mind is lying to you. It's trying to protect you from the pain... from the suffering... from the growth.
That's the question you need to ask yourself every single morning when your alarm goes off and your body is screaming at you to stay in bed.
Nobody is coming to save you. Nobody is coming to do the work for you. It's just you... against you.
Get comfortable being uncomfortable. That's where the magic happens. That's where you find out who you really are.
They don't know me, son. They don't know what I've been through. They don't know what it took to get here.
So when life puts that weight on your back... when everything is falling apart... you look at yourself in that mirror and you say... stay hard.
